title: Cyber Security and Resilience (Network and Information Systems) Bill: factsheets
body: "The Cyber Security and Resilience (Network and Information Systems) Bill, was introduced to Parliament on 12 November 2025 to:   protect the services the public rely on to go about their normal lives deliver a step change in our national security underpin greater economic stability   Further information on the Bill can be found on the Cyber Security and Resilience Bill collection page.  Legislation documents related to the Cyber Security and Resilience (Network and Information Systems) Bill can be found on the Parliament website including:   Cyber Security and Resilience Bill Explanatory Notes Delegated Powers Memorandum Impact Assessments   Please contact cybersecurityandresiliencebill@dsit.gov.uk for any queries.  "
